role: Dean, Nuclear Engineering Faculty, Shahid Beheshti University; killed June 2025
bio: Abdolhamid Minouchehr served as dean of the nuclear engineering faculty at [Shahid Beheshti University](/orgs/shahid-beheshti-university) in Tehran, one of Iran's principal institutions for nuclear science training. He was killed on 13 June 2025 in Israeli airstrikes — the opening attacks of [Operation Rising Lion](/events/israeli-strikes-iran-june-2025) — which specifically targeted Iran's nuclear infrastructure and scientific personnel.
editorial_notes: Dean of nuclear engineering faculty, Shahid Beheshti University. Killed 13 June 2025.
